meaning: adj.[解]子宫的,同母异父的,母系的
examples: This is the uterus down here, sort of half of it is shown with the uterine wall, the fallopian tubes, and the ovaries.
Uterine hypocontractility should be augmented after both the maternal pelvis and fetal presentation have been assessed.
Meanwhile related factors of uterine infection were investigated.
My cervical cancer soon became uterine and I was put into the radiation treatment cycle.
There is some evidence that the drug does increase the risk of developing uterine cancer and cataracts.
